tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: She's the girl _______ father is a famous scientist.
I haven't seen him _______ last Christmas.
He ran fast _______ to catch the bus.
They _______ have arrived by now — the flight landed an hour ago.
This is _______ film I've ever seen.
She made her children _______ their rooms before going out.
I _______ rather go by train than by car.
He's been working here _______ five years.
The cake smells _______. Can I have a piece?
_______ of us knew the answer, so the teacher explained it again.
